scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/cli run build && pnpm -C editor/lsp run build && pnpm -C editor/vscode-ext run build
scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test
scripts.open:vscode-ext: pnpm -C editor/vscode-ext run build:full && node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const {resolve}=require('node:path'); const ext=resolve('editor/vscode-ext'); const input=process.argv[1]; const ws=input ? resolve(input) : resolve('.'); const args=['--new-window', '--extensionDevelopmentPath=' + ext, ws]; const r=spawnSync('code', args, {stdio:'inherit', shell:process.platform==='win32'}); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
scripts.open:vscode-ext:examples: pnpm -C editor/vscode-ext run build:full && node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const {resolve}=require('node:path'); const ext=resolve('editor/vscode-ext'); const ws=resolve('..', 'mega-z80-examples'); const args=['--new-window', '--extensionDevelopmentPath=' + ext, ws]; const r=spawnSync('code', args, {stdio:'inherit', shell:process.platform==='win32'}); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
